Received licensed EDA tools such as Synopsys, Cadence, Keysight, Ansys, and Xilinx under the C2S ChipIN programme, supported by MeitY, Government of India, empowers semiconductor and VLSI research. Industry collaborated labs: IoT (EFFTRONICS) and Test engineering (TESSOLVE) labs to strengthen semiconductor industry. Establishment of TIFAC CORE in Telematics by DST, New Delhi and industries with outlay of 1.6 Crore, first of its kind in the state of AP, for producing industry ready students in the focused core areas. Currently handling projects worth Rs 1.5 Crore and more than Rs 3.5 Crore completed from BARC, ISRO, DST etc. Conduct of research and guidance in the focused areas of 1. Antennas 2. Image Processing 3. RF & MW 4. VLSI & Embedded Systems. Social Media links Linkedin Facebook-f Instagram Youtube Department of ECE PEOs/POs/COs Academics Teaching Learning Process Events Mou's Alumni e-resources Gallery Contact Research Grants 0 Crores Patents 0 Research Publications 0 Consultancy Projects 0 Lakhs Industry Collaboration 0 Centres of Excellence 0 To emerge as a centre of excellence in Electronics and Communication Engineering by fostering education, innovation and research that contribute to advancements in science and technology enabling global recognition and societal impact in frontier areas of national and international relevance Vision To provide quality education experience that equips students with strong problem solving-skills, effective communication abilities, leadership qualities and teamwork spirit in the domain of Electronics and Communication Engineering. To cultivate research culture in the frontier and emerging areas related to electronics and communication engineering fostering innovation and contributing to both national and international technological advancements. To establish partnerships with industry, academia and research organization providing students with real world exposure and enhancing their competencies for contributing solutions of regional, national and global relevance. Mission Dr. D. Venkata Rao Professor & Head Welcome Message The Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering is dedicated to cultivating technically proficient and socially responsible engineers. Through a cutting-edge curriculum and innovative teaching methods, we provide a solid foundation in electronics and communication technologies. Our program emphasizes expertise in the design, development, and implementation of application-oriented engineering systems, with particular focus on VLSI and IoT technologies, enabling students to develop functional hardware and software modules for signal processing and communication applications. We have established Memorandums of Understanding (MoUs) with prestigious institutions such as IIT Bombay and IISc Bangalore, as well as industry partners like Lam Research and AVANTEL. These collaborations offer our students valuable opportunities for internships and involvement in research projects, enhancing their employability and practical skills. Programs Offered Electronics and Communication Engineering Year of Establishment: 1977 Intake: 240 VLSI Design & Embedded Systems Year of Establishment: 2012 Intake: 12 Signal Processing and Communication Year of Establishment: 2025 Intake: 12 Ph.D Year of Establishment: 2024 Intake: 12 Placements The Department of ECE is a highly sought-after source for recruitment by numerous companies. We are committed to nurturing our students into well-rounded individuals, blending strong theoretical knowledge with practical skills, along with soft skills training to boost their employability. These efforts have proven successful, with the majority of our students securing campus placements. We take pride in sharing that our students have received a total of 1,442* placement offers from reputable companies. *Last five years Placement Offers 0 * Companies Visited 0 HIghest Package 0 LPA Average CTC 0 LPA Average Package Offered by Accenture For 211 Students 0 LPA Average Package Offered by TCS For 328 Students 0 LPA Placement Report Faculty The Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering is proud to have a highly qualified faculty team, with 65% holding Ph.D. degrees from prestigious institutions such as IITs, IIITs, NITs, and leading government institutions. This strong academic foundation enables them to effectively impart essential skills to students. Our faculty members are recognized research guides in specialized fields including VLSI Design, Embedded Systems, Image Processing, Signal Processing, Wireless Communication, RF and Antenna, IoT, and Machine Learning. They actively contribute to government and industry-funded research projects, publish in well-regarded international journals, and hold patents for their innovations. Regular participation in international conferences, faculty development programs (FDPs), and workshops keeps them at the forefront of their fields. Additionally, robust collaborations with industry partners enrich practical learning and foster innovation. Dedicated to both teaching and research, the faculty play a crucial role in preparing students to become skilled professionals and future innovators.
